name: Ginger Waffles
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to the desired temperature.
2. In a large bowl, sift together the flour, salt, baking soda, and baking powder.
3. Add the beaten eggs, molasses, buttermilk, applesauce, and ginger to the dry ingredients. Mix until well combined.
4. Pour the batter into a preheated waffle iron.
5. Cook according to the manufacturer's instructions until golden brown and crispy.
6. Remove from the waffle iron and serve immediately.
